content:
{
  "mnemonics": [
    "Tightrope":
      "T" - Test the model,
      "I" - Identify issues,
      "M" - Measure residuals,
      "E" - Evaluate fit,
      "S" - Simplify diagnostics,
      "T" - Tailor to data,
      "R" - Review results,
      "O" - Optimize model,
      "P" - Prepare for next step,
      "E" - Explore alternatives,
      "S" - Solve problems
  ],
  "keyPoints": [
    "The purpose of diagnostic checking is to ensure the model accurately represents the underlying process.",
